blocks.code:
; EDIT THIS: your move as (row col). Rows and cols are 0-2. You play X.
(define YOUR_MOVE (list 1 1))
(define BOARD_BEFORE (list
  (list 0 0 0)
  (list 0 0 0)
  (list 0 0 0)))

(define (set-cell board r c v)
  (map (lambda (ri)
    (if (= ri r)
        (map (lambda (ci) (if (= ci c) v (nth (nth board ri) ci))) (range 0 3))
        (nth board ri)))
    (range 0 3)))
(define after-you (set-cell BOARD_BEFORE (nth YOUR_MOVE 0) (nth YOUR_MOVE 1) 1))
(define (empty-cells board)
  (filter (lambda (c) (= (nth (nth board (nth c 0)) (nth c 1)) 0))
          (append (map (lambda (c) (list 0 c)) (range 0 3))
                  (map (lambda (c) (list 1 c)) (range 0 3))
                  (map (lambda (c) (list 2 c)) (range 0 3)))))
(define (check-winner board)
  (define lines (list
    (list (list 0 0) (list 0 1) (list 0 2)) (list (list 1 0) (list 1 1) (list 1 2))
    (list (list 2 0) (list 2 1) (list 2 2)) (list (list 0 0) (list 1 0) (list 2 0))
    (list (list 0 1) (list 1 1) (list 2 1)) (list (list 0 2) (list 1 2) (list 2 2))
    (list (list 0 0) (list 1 1) (list 2 2)) (list (list 0 2) (list 1 1) (list 2 0))))
  (define won (filter (lambda (line)
    (let ((a (nth (nth board (nth (nth line 0) 0)) (nth (nth line 0) 1)))
          (b (nth (nth board (nth (nth line 1) 0)) (nth (nth line 1) 1)))
          (c (nth (nth board (nth (nth line 2) 0)) (nth (nth line 2) 1))))
      (and (= a b) (= b c) (not (= a 0))))) lines))
  (if (null? won) (if (null? (empty-cells board)) 0 nil)
      (nth (nth board (nth (nth (car won) 0) 0)) (nth (nth (car won) 0) 1))))
(define (ai-move board)
  (let ((empties (empty-cells board)))
    (if (null? empties) nil
        (let ((center (list 1 1))
              (corners (list (list 0 0) (list 0 2) (list 2 0) (list 2 2))))
          (cond ((member? center empties) center)
                (else (let ((free (filter (lambda (c) (member? c empties)) corners)))
                        (if (null? free) (car empties) (car free)))))))))
(define (render-cell v) (cond ((= v 1) "X") ((= v 2) "O") (else ".")))
(define (render board)
  (string-join (map (lambda (row) (string-join (map render-cell row) " | ")) board) "\n---------\n"))
(println "YOU JUST PLAYED:")
(println (render after-you))
(define winner-after-you (check-winner after-you))
(if (= winner-after-you 1) (println "\n🎉 YOU WON")
  (let ((ai-mv (ai-move after-you)))
    (if (= ai-mv nil) (println "\nDRAW")
      (let ((after-ai (set-cell after-you (nth ai-mv 0) (nth ai-mv 1) 2)))
        (println (string-append "\nAI played (" (number->string (nth ai-mv 0)) " " (number->string (nth ai-mv 1)) "):"))
        (println (render after-ai))
        (let ((w (check-winner after-ai)))
          (cond ((= w 2) (println "\n💀 AI WINS"))
                ((= w 0) (println "\nDRAW"))
                (else (println "\n(your move — edit YOUR_MOVE and BOARD_BEFORE to continue)"))))))))
